subject: Gong integration not pulling transcripts
body: We set up the Gong integration last week but transcripts aren't appearing in the workflow. We've tried reconnecting three times. Our team is blocked on this — we can't demo the tool to leadership until it works.
csm_note: Third ticket on this issue. Engineering has a fix in sprint but not deployed yet.

subject: Need training session for new CS hires
body: We have 4 new CSMs joining next month. Can we get a group onboarding session? The documentation is helpful but they learn better with a live walkthrough.
csm_note: Should schedule before renewal discussion in May.

subject: Workflow output format — request for CSV export
body: We'd like to be able to export workflow outputs as CSV so we can pull them into our weekly CS report in Google Sheets. Currently we're copying manually.
csm_note: Closed as product feedback. On roadmap Q3.
